userForm.term: Accept Terms of Service and Security Policies
userForm.question1: How do I change the language?
userForm.question2: Where can I see my data?
userForm.question3: How do I submit a report?
userForm.answer1: Click the language icon and select your preference.
userForm.answer3: Click the report icon, fill out the form with the required data, and click submit.

terms.content1: By accessing and using this platform, you agree to comply with these terms and conditions, as well as our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.
terms.item2_1: Service Access: Right to continuously access the platform as long as your account is active and compliant with these terms.
terms.item2_2: Features: Use of all tools available based on your access level, including the interactive heat map and incident reporting.
terms.item2_3: Privacy: Protection of your personal data according to applicable laws.
terms.item3_1: Proper Use: Use the platform lawfully, without defamatory, illegal, or rights-infringing content.
terms.item3_2: Accuracy: Responsibility for the truthfulness of information provided, especially in incident reports.
terms.item3_3: Security: Maintain credential confidentiality and be accountable for all activity under your account.
terms.item4_1: Commercial Use: Unauthorized commercial use of the platform or data is prohibited.
terms.item4_2: Unauthorized Access: Attempting to access restricted areas is not allowed.
terms.item4_3: Interference: Actions that affect performance or availability are forbidden.
terms.item5_1: Availability: Maintain platform operations, notifying users of scheduled maintenance.
terms.item5_2: Data Protection: Apply technical and organizational security measures.
terms.item5_3: Support: Provide technical support through established channels.
terms.item6_1: Account Suspension: Right to suspend or delete accounts that breach these terms.
terms.item6_2: Modifications: Ability to temporarily update or restrict features due to maintenance.
terms.content7: All rights to the platform, its design, and content belong exclusively to the service provider. Unauthorized reproduction is prohibited.
terms.item8_1: Not responsible for indirect damages or data loss.
terms.item8_3: Not responsible for service interruptions due to external factors.
terms.content9: These terms may be updated periodically. Continued use after updates implies acceptance.

authorityForm.message: Please fill in the indicated information to create your account
authorityForm.terms_and_policies: Accept Terms of Service and Security Policies

payment.considerations_content: Your access is on a monthly basis and will automatically renew every 30 days from activation. If you decide not to continue with the service, you have the option to cancel it at any time from your profile. By doing so, please note that the privileges and subscription will be deactivated once the current billing cycle ends.
